name: skylence
description: Skylence .sky workflow authoring and operation: 5 slash commands (incl. /lsp install <language>), 5 skills, 6 bundled MCP servers (stdio + HTTP), 13 LSP servers (skyway lsp stdio plus the official Claude Code language servers), and a judge hook (PreToolUse rules engine, opt-in via ~/.claude/judge-rules.json). The skyway binary is optional — servers for missing binaries simply don't start.
